summary: Backend testing complete for GITB LMS two-stage payment system. All 44 tests passed (13 new payment tests + 31 original tests, 1 skipped). Full payment flow verified: Application → Registration fee → Webhook → Approval → Enrollment with pending_payment → Tuition payment → Course unlocked.
critical_code_review_comments: Two-stage payment flow correctly implemented: Registration fee (€50) creates application in pending_payment status, webhook moves to pending, approval creates enrollment with pending_payment status, tuition webhook unlocks course.
MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from responses via projection: { _id: 0 }
Stripe integration working with live keys for both registration and tuition payments
Email notifications configured via Resend for welcome emails with tuition info
seed_data_creation: Test applications and users created during testing (prefixed with TEST_). Test data remains in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All two-stage payment endpoints verified working. Test credentials: Admin (taiwojos2@yahoo.com / Passw0rd@1), Student (student@gitb.lt / TestStudent@1). The student has an enrollment with pending_payment status for UI/UX course. Test data with TEST_ prefix exists in database.

test_features_verified.login_endpoint_admin: PASS - Admin login returns correct user data and JWT token
test_features_verified.login_endpoint_student: PASS - Student login returns user data with payment_status field
test_features_verified.application_creation_stripe_checkout: PASS - Creates application and returns Stripe checkout URL for €50 registration fee
test_features_verified.stripe_webhook_registration_fee: PASS - Webhook updates application from pending_payment to pending status
test_features_verified.admin_approval_creates_enrollment: PASS - Approval creates enrollment with pending_payment status and tuition_amount
test_features_verified.my_courses_endpoint: PASS - Returns student's courses with enrollment_status and payment_status
test_features_verified.tuition_pay_endpoint: PASS - Returns Stripe checkout URL for course tuition fee
test_features_verified.tuition_status_endpoint: PASS - Returns enrollment status and payment status for session
test_features_verified.tuition_webhook_unlocks_course: PASS - Webhook updates enrollment to active status with tuition_paid_at timestamp
test_features_verified.edge_cases: PASS - Auth required, course_id validation, duplicate application rejection

two_stage_payment_flow_verified.step_1_application: Student applies → Stripe checkout for €50 registration fee
two_stage_payment_flow_verified.step_2_registration_paid: Webhook moves application to 'pending' (ready for review)
two_stage_payment_flow_verified.step_3_approval: Admin approves → Creates enrollment with status='pending_payment', tuition_amount set
two_stage_payment_flow_verified.step_4_tuition_payment: Student logs in → Sees pending course → Pays tuition via Stripe
two_stage_payment_flow_verified.step_5_course_unlocked: Webhook updates enrollment to status='active', payment_status='paid', tuition_paid_at set
